documentation.text:
An organ contains a list of entries and a set of procedures.
A procedure is a contract that can effect changes on organs.
An entry can be a document and/or an address (a wallet or a contract).

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (struct OrganLibrary.OrganData storage pointer,struct OrganLibrary.Entry memory[] memory) returns (uint256[] memory)

function (struct OrganLibrary.OrganData storage pointer) view returns (uint256)
function (struct OrganLibrary.OrganData storage pointer,uint256) view returns (address,bytes2)
function (struct OrganLibrary.OrganData storage pointer,address) view returns (bytes2)
function (struct OrganLibrary.OrganData storage pointer) view returns (bytes32,uint8,uint8)
